description: Dynasty contract league rules and strategy

salary_cap.rookie_contracts: Drafted rookies get 4-year rookie deals at fixed salary (e.g. $5-15 based on draft slot). MASSIVE value.
salary_cap.veteran_contracts: Free agents bid on in auction. Overpaying creates dead cap risk.
salary_cap.dead_cap: Cutting a player with years remaining = dead cap hits. Can cripple team.
salary_cap.strategy: Hoard rookie contracts. Never overpay in free agency. Build through draft. Elite QB on rookie deal = championship window.
salary_cap.key_insight: In contract leagues, a rookie contract player worth 7000 dynasty value at $8/yr salary is worth FAR more than a veteran at $30/yr same value.

sleeper_contract_api.contract_fields: Each player on roster has: contract_years, contract_value in metadata
sleeper_contract_api.note: Contract data available via Sleeper API if commissioner has set it up
